meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging Workflow for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to conquer complex debugging. Learn an advanced workflow using Antigravity to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop wrestling with cryptic stack traces. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous diagnostic engine that analyzes your codebase, identifies root causes, and implements fixes. This setup transforms debugging from a manual, time-draining chore into an automated, high-velocity workflow, allowing you to ship production-ready code with absolute confidence.
content.intro:
It is 3:00 AM. A mission-critical production bug has surfaced, and your client is expecting a patch before the morning stand-up. You are staring at a wall of logs, the stack trace feels like a cryptic riddle, and every manual fix seems to introduce a regression elsewhere. The pressure isn't just about the code; it is about your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer.

But what if you didn't have to hunt these bugs alone? By leveraging Claude Code’s agentic capabilities alongside Antigravity’s architectural insights, you can shift from reactive firefighting to proactive, automated engineering. This guide provides the blueprint for building a debugging powerhouse that handles the heavy lifting, letting you focus on high-level architecture.

steps.title: Environment Audit & Context Injection
steps.description: Before debugging, you must ensure the agent understands your project's architectural constraints and dependency graph.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify potential failure points in the authentication and database middleware. Create a context summary for Claude Code.

steps.title: Autonomous Log Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly to Claude Code to generate a diagnostic hypothesis based on historical patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Parse the recent error logs in /logs/production.log. Identify the top 3 recurring exceptions and map them to their corresponding source files.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze these logs and suggest the most likely cause for the 500 error on the checkout route: $(cat logs/production.log | tail -n 50)'

steps.title: Isolated Regression Testing
steps.description: Create an isolated test environment using Antigravity to simulate the bug without affecting the main codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an integration test script that reproduces the identified bug in a sandboxed environment.

steps.title: Architectural Patching
steps.description: Use Claude Code to apply a surgical fix that adheres to your existing design patterns, avoiding technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch that resolves the null-pointer exception in the checkout service while maintaining strict dependency injection standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file src/services/checkout.ts --prompt 'Apply the architectural fix based on the dependency injection standards.'

steps.title: Verification & Cleanup
steps.description: Validate the fix and automate the removal of debug artifacts to keep your repository clean.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the reproduction test case and ensure no residual debug code remains.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm test' && claude run 'npm run lint:fix'

pro_tips: Always set your context-strategy to 'full-project-map' in large repos to prevent the agent from hallucinating dependencies.
Use Antigravity to generate custom 'debug-tags' in your code; Claude Code can then search for these specific markers during deep-dive sessions.
Pipeline your Claude Code commands into your CI/CD flow to catch regressions before they reach your staging environment.
When a bug persists, ask Claude Code to 'Explain the architectural trade-offs of the current implementation' to uncover underlying design flaws.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' in your root; Claude Code uses this to understand your preferred coding style and project-specific conventions.
content.next_steps: Once your debugging workflow is automated, focus on creating custom Antigravity templates for your standard boilerplate to reduce development time by an additional 40%.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start mastering your environment. Join our elite circle of engineers who ship faster, debug smarter, and command premium rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
